channel.title: Hugo on Deep Fried Code
channel.description: Recent content in Hugo on Deep Fried Code

item.title: Building the Site
item.description:
Step 1: Setting Up Hugo

Why hugo? I decided to choose a static site generator that was fast, easy to use, and had a lot of support. Now it was time to setup the environment. I am using WSL2 with Ubuntu, so the instructions will follow for that.

Installing hugo and setting up the site

First, get hugo for ubuntu.

$ sudo apt install hugo

Next, I setup the project directory and generated the skeleton using hugo:
